span.p:
new(high) → append
supersede → replace
contradict → stale old

span.p:
1 · FIND — find-chats.sh
marker + window → transcript batches
default 7d · --since · --all · private excluded

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
2 · MAP — 1 subagent / chat (isolated)
extract candidate facts · A=write B/C=drop D/E=queue

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
3 · REDUCE — structural merge (no LLM)
dedup exact · confidence promote only

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
5b · READ PAGE
vaultRoot/page → read target
(empty if new)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
7 · APPLY — apply-decision.sh
action → write mode
(dry-run: write nothing)

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Obsidian vault pages
+ wiki/index.md + undo log

a / e / s / d / q

reports_dir + index
Written · Superseded · Queued · Skipped
